rulings.Case Title: CASEY, PATRICIA AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: APPEARANCES: Shelley K. Tinkoff, Esq., of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant / moving party Perini Corporation Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Patricia Casey, et al. RULING: DEFENDANT PERINI CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted as amended: Defendant Perini Corporation's demurrer to plaintiffs' complaint is sustained in part and off calendar in part. Defendant's special demurrers to the fifth (negligence-wrongful death), sixth (strict liability-wrongful death) and seventh (premises owner/contractor liability) causes of action are sustained with leave to amend. Defendant's special demurrers to the first (negligence-survival) and second (strict liability-survival) causes of action are off calendar because plaintiffs have dismissed them. This action against Perini is stayed pending disposition of the Court of Appeal in the Perini Corporation's earlier lawsuit. Counsel for defendant is to prepare an order for the Court's signature. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609 = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: DOLYE D GREEN et al VS. ASBESTOS COMPANIES et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 30, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Bucyrus International Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden of production under Aguilar by demonstrating that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence supporting their claims against defendant. Plaintiffs failed to present admissible evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Green was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Assuming without deciding that the brakes at issue contained asbestos, plaintiffs failed to create a triable issue whether those brakes were original equipment or replacement parts manufactured, sold, supplied or distributed by defendant. Defendant¿s D¿Amico objections to Mr. Green¿s declaration are sustained. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
